---
title: "Scientific Machine Learning, Computational Science, and Miscellaneous Topics"
description: "Theory, Applications, and Random Rants on SciML"
listing:
  contents: posts
  sort: "date desc"
  type: grid
  categories: true
  sort-ui: false
  filter-ui: true
  page-size: 9
  feed: true
page-layout: full
title-block-banner: false
---

::: {.hero}
::: {.hero-kicker}
AN APPLIED MATHEMATICS BLOG
:::

# Machine Learning Methods for Solving Physics Problems

Notes on scientific machine learning, numerical analysis, optimization, and the mathematical structure connecting them.

[Read the latest notes](#latest-notes){.btn .btn-primary .btn-lg} [About the author](about.qmd){.btn .btn-outline-secondary .btn-lg}
:::

## Latest notes {#latest-notes}

Each post aims to cover a specific topic in math, machine learning, computational science, or all of the above!
